text: There once was a young girl named Lily. She lived alone in her grandparents' house after they passed away. She loved making memories but was bored. One day she found an old doll in her attic. She named her Daisy. Lily played with Daisy every day. Soon she met her best friend Tom. Tom lived nearby. She'd visit him whenever she could. Their favorite game was hopscotch. Lily made the squares. It became theirs. They explored fields full of butterflies. One summer she planted flowers. They bloomed. She put them in pots. They traveled around. Daisy loved it. Lily didn't get sick often. Tom gave her chicken soup. Had a cold. They watched cartoons. She gave him stickers. They had pillow fights. It was magical. Eventually Lily realized she missed her parents. Missed Grandma most of all. One day Grandma visited. She felt her breath. Cute little one. Missed you so much. Goodbye.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
